test.summary: 34 unit tests pass, 7 integration tests fail (ConnectionRefused to localhost:3100), 9 integration tests skipped

lint.summary: ESLint v9 requires eslint.config.js but none exists in project

blockingIssues.description: ESLint configuration file missing. ESLint v9 requires eslint.config.js but the project has no ESLint config file.
Integration tests fail because PostgreSQL is not running. 7 tests fail with ConnectionRefused to localhost:3100. The API cannot start without PostgreSQL.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance on ESLint v9 migration. The project uses ESLint 9.x which requires eslint.config.js format instead of .eslintrc.*
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: lint command fails with 'ESLint couldn't find an eslint.config.(js|mjs|cjs) file'

notes: Could not spawn feature review subagents because validators failed. Per skill instructions: 'Do not proceed to feature review' when validators fail.
